decisions.decision: TF-IDF cosine + 4× name-boost + per-tool routing_aliases ClassVar over keyword stuffing
decisions.rationale: Keeps human-facing docstrings honest; aliases live on the tool class so they're discoverable, drift-resistant, and decoupled from the routing scorer. Generic-name dampener (0.25× for 'use', 'function', 'import', etc.) prevents tools like scalpel_use_function from cannibalizing every prompt that says 'function'.

decisions.decision: Per-symbol move applied in-place via rope.Project.do, NOT batched
decisions.rationale: MoveGlobal.get_changes computes against the current view; per-symbol moves only converge when each iteration writes to disk and refreshes rope's project state.

Rope MoveGlobal prepends each symbol to the target file; reversing the user's list yields the user-supplied order in the target. Critical for forward declarations like 'Expr = Union[Num, Add, ...]' which needs Num/Add defined above.

decisions.decision: Add post-pass _rewrite_package_reexports for from .OLD import S patterns
decisions.rationale: Rope's MoveGlobal updates direct importers but not package-level re-exports in __init__.py. The post-pass parses every .py under the project, locates ImportFrom nodes targeting the source module (relative imports keyed by basename + parent-dir match; absolute imports keyed by full dotted path), and rewrites the moved names onto the new modules.

decisions.decision: Shadow-mode runs facades with dry_run=False against the shadow copy
decisions.rationale: A true preview asks 'what would happen if I committed?' — running with dry_run=False against an isolated copy reveals the *applied* state, strictly more informative than the facade's own dry_run=True interpretation, and survives facades whose dry_run path lies (Item C's misbehaving-facade regression test).

Ruff's LSP rejects textDocument/documentSymbol with method-not-found; without per-server isolation a single server's gap aborts the entire scan. Discovered while running broad-suite verification of Item C.

decisions.decision: Item D ships an audit + roadmap, not 4 new facades
decisions.rationale: The gate is '3 user requests per facade' and that demand evidence isn't in hand. Speculative facades accumulate maintenance cost (routing-benchmark trials, drift-CI docstring policing, capability catalog entries) without proportional value. The 4 candidate slots (scalpel_inline_temp, scalpel_remove_dead_code, scalpel_swap_arguments, scalpel_convert_to_classmethod) are documented with LSP backing + admission procedure for when demand arrives.

next_action: Awaiting user direction. Suggested next steps: (1) restart MCP servers + flush uv cache to verify the rebrand against a live engine SHA at v1.9.3; (2) cut a v1.9.x consolidated GH release with combined notes from the 5 milestones; (3) tackle one of the 4 v2.0 candidate slots if user demand evidence has accumulated; (4) sweep the remaining pre-existing pyright info-hints (~30 'not accessed' warnings across scalpel_facades.py, scalpel_primitives.py, dashboard.py) — the project's diagnostic-discipline memory note flags those as fix-required.
context_notes: 5 milestones shipped end-to-end via git-flow (engine: 5 feature branches → main + tags; parent: 5 pointer branches → develop → main + tags). Total 8 engine commits + 5 parent commits + 10 tags. Final regression sweep on the touched surface: 161/161 + 1 honest skip. Broad-suite sweep (1213 s, 1984 / 38 / 1 / 15): all 15 failures verified pre-existing at the v1.7-p7-rollback-inverse-applier tag — 8 host-binary LSP gaps (go/powershell/haxe/lean4 find_symbol*), 3 pylsp/Nix/ipynb host gaps, 1 flaky broad-suite-only failure (test_broadcast_runs_three_python_servers_in_parallel passes 1/1 in isolation in 3.48s). Net: zero regressions from the milestone bundle. Phase 4 routing benchmark at 100% top-1 (gate was 63.3%). Dogfooded the o2-scalpel-python MCP plugin live — used find_symbol against the rebranded engine to verify MCP introspection still worked post-rebrand. Pre-existing test debt fixed alongside: rollback docstring word count, Stage 3 wave-B dispatch fixtures, S6 buffer-aware eof preflight, E1-py 4-way split byte-identity, E2 dry-run/commit CAPABILITY_NOT_AVAILABLE handling, pylsp_lsp/calcpy_dataclasses workspace mismatch. Browser screenshots at .planning/dashboard-rebrand-screenshot.png (light, stub agent → friendly 500 envelope), .planning/dashboard-rebrand-dark.png (dark, stub agent), .planning/dashboard-live-real-backend.png (LIVE backend on 24283 — stale process serving old Serena branding because MCP processes pre-date the rebrand and run from uv-cached archive snapshots, not vendor/serena).
